description: Anatomical orientation configuration for cutout_st_odf_glyph.ipynb. Add one entry per dataset with the rotation matrix that maps image axes (z,y,x) to anatomical axes (e.g. A-P, D-V, M-L).

usage.dec_rotation: vectors_anat = vectors @ anatomical_rotation.T  — rotate ST eigenvectors before DEC colouring
usage.dec_convention: After rotation: R = dim-0, G = dim-1, B = dim-2 of the rotated vector
usage.camera_note: CAMERA_POS in the notebook is in anatomical space; adjust per dataset for the desired view plane

datasets.name: My Dataset Name
datasets.anatomical_rotation_note: Example: flip the z-axis to align with A-P convention. Replace with your dataset's actual rotation.
datasets.notes: Edit DATASET_ID in the notebook Parameters cell to match this 'id'.
